name: agora
description: Agora: language flashcards in Claude Code's thinking spinner. Free, 5 languages, spaced repetition.

plugins.name: agora
plugins.description: Language flashcards in Claude Code's thinking spinner bar - learn a language in the seconds you wait on AI. Spaced repetition, 5 languages (500 words each), free. /agora:setup to install, /agora:deck to switch language, /agora:study to pop a review session into its own terminal.
